query: SELECT IFNULL(tenantId, 'NULL_VALUE') as tenant_id_str, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM calls WHERE createdAt >= '2026-02-03 06:00:00' GROUP BY tenantId;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT IFNULL(tenantId, 'NULL_VALUE') as tenant_id_str, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM calls WHERE createdAt >= '2026-02-03 06:00:00' GROUP BY tenantId;
